que: Where are modules typically registered in a Gradle Android project?

options: A dependency on another local module

que: When should a module enable Compose?
options: Only app module can use Compose

que: Why use convention plugins or shared build logic?

options: implementation when re-export is not needed

que: What is one multimodule scaling tip?
options: Document the purpose of each module
Give all modules the same name
Let all modules depend on all others

que: Which module usually depends on feature modules to assemble the app?

options: To control coupling and maintenance cost
